channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup
item.description: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.

item.title: An FDA Panel Just Endorsed These Unproven Peptides
item.description: Outside experts—some with a vested interest in peptides—recommended adding a number of the amino acids to the FDA's bulk list, including the “Wolverine stack” touted by Joe Rogan and other influencers.

item.title: Microsoft launches new in-house AI models it says cut costs up to 89% versus OpenAI
item.description: Microsoft AI released two new in-house models into public preview on Wednesday — MAI-Image-2.5-Pro, its highest-fidelity image generator to date, and MAI-Voice-2-Flash, a speech model built for high-volume enterprise workloads — while publishing production data that amounts to the company's most aggressive argument yet that it can power its own products without leaning on OpenAI's frontier models.The announcement, made by Microsoft AI's Superintelligence team, lands roughly a year after the company committed to building purpose-built models internally, and it arrives with an unusual level of s...

item.title: Nvidia's latest trick for cooling its data center hardware is... hot water? 'Hot liquid cooling' is warmer than a hot tub, but apparently does the job pretty well
item.description: Nvidia's newest AI servers are cooled by water hotter than a hot tub: 45°C going in, 55°C coming out, while skipping out on fans altogether

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, July 24 (game #1139)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, July 24 (game #873)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, July 24 (game #1642)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
item.description: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

item.title: Scientists develop handheld device for measuring when your body is burning fat
item.description: The breathalyzer identifies the amount of acetone in your breath to determine if your body is in ketosis.

item.title: My favorite music streaming site just got a big update that makes me even happier I quit Spotify six months ago
item.description: The high-res audio streaming service Qobuz has got an app upgrade that makes it much easier to use. Here's what's changed.
